# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom build command to execute')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom test script to execute')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom deployment step to execute')
    }

    environment {
        SAFE_BUILD_COMMAND = "${params.BUILD_COMMAND.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\\s]/, '')}"
        SAFE_TEST_SCRIPT = "${params.TEST_SCRIPT.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\\s]/, '')}"
        SAFE_DEPLOY_STEP = "${params.DEPLOY_STEP.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\\s]/, '')}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (SAFE_BUILD_COMMAND) {
                        sh "echo 'Executing build command: ${SAFE_BUILD_COMMAND}'"
                        sh "${SAFE_BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        error 'No valid build command provided.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (SAFE_TEST_SCRIPT) {
                        sh "echo 'Executing test script: ${SAFE_TEST_SCRIPT}'"
                        sh "${SAFE_TEST_SCRIPT}"
                    } else {
                        error 'No valid test script provided.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (SAFE_DEPLOY_STEP) {
                        sh "echo 'Executing deployment step: ${SAFE_DEPLOY_STEP}'"
                        sh "${SAFE_DEPLOY_STEP}"
                    } else {
                        error 'No valid deployment step provided.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo 'Cleaning up...'
            // Add any necessary cleanup steps here
        }
    }
}
